infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoTrack needs camera access to capture geo-tagged work site photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoTrack needs your location to verify your work zone and record GPS check-ins.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GeoTrack uses your location for GPS check-in verification.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoTrack uses location for GPS check-in and zone verification.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoTrack uses location for GPS check-in and zone verification.

plugins.cameraPermission: GeoTrack uses the camera to capture geo-tagged work site photos.
